title: Recruitment Executive Job at African Industries Group
content:
African Industries Group (AIG) is a diversified global conglomerate with a legacy of 52 years of business excellence and sustainable growth. It is headquartered in Lagos, Nigeria. It has been contributing to Nigeria’s socio-economic growth and industrial development and is equally committed towards the nurturing and development of the local community.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Recruitment Executive

Job Location: Ikoyi, Lagos
Employment Type: Full-time

Job Summary
     

        



     (adsbygoogle = window.adsbygoogle || []).push({});
    
    




	We are seeking a proactive and results-driven Recruitment Executive to join our team.
	The ideal candidate will be responsible for sourcing, attracting, and hiring top talent to meet the organization’s staffing needs.


Key Responsibilities


	Manage the end-to-end recruitment process
	Source candidates through various channels (job boards, social media, referrals, etc.)
	Screen resumes and conduct initial interviews
	Coordinate interviews with hiring managers
	Maintain candidate databases and recruitment reports
	Ensure a positive candidate experience throughout the hiring process.


Requirements


	Bachelor’s degree in human resources, Business Administration, or related field
	Proven experience in recruitment or talent acquisition
	Strong communication and interpersonal skills
	Ability to work in a fast-paced environment
	Good organizational and time management skills.


Salary
N350,000 Monthly.

Method of Application 
Interested and qualified candidates should send their updated resume to: [email protected] using the Job Position as the subject of the mail.    

    

        Click here to Apply

  "description": "Lopterra Services Limited -&nbsp;Our client operates a reputable online store that deals in diverse consumer goods like car &amp; solar accessories, etc and they are seeking dynamic candidates to fill the position below

Job Position: Office / Admin Support Assistant

Job Location:&nbsp;Oregun, Ikeja - Lagos
Employment Type: Full-time
Work Hours:7.30am &ndash; 5.30pm

Job Description


	The ideal candidate will become an integral part of their dedicated team, to contribute to the growth and success of their store.
	The Admin support personnel will be responsible for welcoming customers, coordinating deliveries, Support business growth through creative ideas, timely and exceptional customer services to boost sales.


Responsibilities


	Maintain a clean and tidied showroom and office area; Warmly welcome all customers, attend to them, and keep records of their details
	Daily and weekly update of sales records, expense report and inventory template with line manager supervision and operational data on the inventory sheet
	Manage the DC inventory and reporting with e-Commerce Executive to ensure timely replenishment of low stock, all year availability of products and no lost product.
	Promptly and constantly uploads of new products in showroom and on e-commerce platforms; (Jumia, and Konga)within 48hrs of product availability
	Respond to all messages on Jumia and Konga platforms within 1hr, during working hours, and not later than 12hrs after COB
	Shipping of ordered goods at e-commerce partners&rsquo; office within 24/48hrs of request- No cancellation to orders; Promptly collect all return orders
	Coordinate effective and timely delivery of goods to customers, in cost effective manners though logistics companies.
	Attending to clerical tasks, ensure proper and accurate book keeping, and filing of company&rsquo;s documents: invoices, goods receipts, waybill, and all administrative records.
	And any other task as assigned by your supervisor and management


Job requirements


	Educational background: O&#39;Levels (SSCE, NECO, WAEC)
	Proven experience in a similar role and familiarity with inventory management software and tools, Microsoft Office Suite (Excel, Word, etc.) is an added advantage
	Strong organizational and multitasking skills, attention to detail and accuracy, excellent communication and interpersonal skills.


Salary

Office / Admin Support Assistant Job at Lopterra Services Limited




        
    

        
        Lopterra Services Limited - Our client operates a reputable online store that deals in diverse consumer goods like car & solar accessories, etc and they are seeking dynamic candidates to fill the position below

Job Position: Office / Admin Support Assistant

Job Location: Oregun, Ikeja - Lagos
Employment Type: Full-time
Work Hours:7.30am – 5.30pm

Job Description
     

        



     (adsbygoogle = window.adsbygoogle || []).push({});
    
    




	The ideal candidate will become an integral part of their dedicated team, to contribute to the growth and success of their store.
	The Admin support personnel will be responsible for welcoming customers, coordinating deliveries, Support business growth through creative ideas, timely and exceptional customer services to boost sales.


Responsibilities


	Maintain a clean and tidied showroom and office area; Warmly welcome all customers, attend to them, and keep records of their details
	Daily and weekly update of sales records, expense report and inventory template with line manager supervision and operational data on the inventory sheet
	Manage the DC inventory and reporting with e-Commerce Executive to ensure timely replenishment of low stock, all year availability of products and no lost product.
	Promptly and constantly uploads of new products in showroom and on e-commerce platforms; (Jumia, and Konga)within 48hrs of product availability
	Respond to all messages on Jumia and Konga platforms within 1hr, during working hours, and not later than 12hrs after COB
	Shipping of ordered goods at e-commerce partners’ office within 24/48hrs of request- No cancellation to orders; Promptly collect all return orders
	Coordinate effective and timely delivery of goods to customers, in cost effective manners though logistics companies.
	Attending to clerical tasks, ensure proper and accurate book keeping, and filing of company’s documents: invoices, goods receipts, waybill, and all administrative records.
	And any other task as assigned by your supervisor and management


Job requirements


	Educational background: O'Levels (SSCE, NECO, WAEC)
	Proven experience in a similar role and familiarity with inventory management software and tools, Microsoft Office Suite (Excel, Word, etc.) is an added advantage
	Strong organizational and multitasking skills, attention to detail and accuracy, excellent communication and interpersonal skills.


Salary
N70,000 monthly.    

    

        Click here to Apply

title: Job Vacancies at Thrive HR Solutions Limited
content:
Thrive HR Solutions Limited is recruiting suitable candidates to fill the following positions below:

1.) Canadian Immigration Agent

Job Location: Remote
Employment Type: Full-time

Key Responsibilities
     

        



     (adsbygoogle = window.adsbygoogle || []).push({});
    
    




	Identify and engage potential clients interested in Canadian immigration services.
	Promote and explain Canadian immigration application services, including eligibility, documentation requirements, and application processes.
	Screen and qualify leads to ensure they meet the criteria for Canadian immigration programs.
	Build and maintain a pipeline of interested applicants and track client interactions.
	Provide guidance and support to prospective clients on the application process before handing them over to our Canadian immigration lawyer.
	Ensure smooth and professional handoff of qualified clients to our legal partner.
	Meet and exceed monthly referral targets while maintaining compliance with ethical marketing standards.


Requirements


	Proven experience in sales, marketing, or client acquisition.
	Demonstrated knowledge and/or experience with Canadian immigration applications (e.g., Express Entry, study/work permits, PR applications) is highly preferred.
	Strong communication, interpersonal, and client management skills.
	Self-motivated, goal-oriented, and able to work independently.
	Ability to work remotely and manage your own pipeline efficiently.
	Professional and trustworthy with the ability to handle sensitive client information.


Compensation


	Commission-based: Up to N500,000 per successful referral.
	High earning potential for top performers.


Application Closing Date: 15th August, 2026.

Method of Application
Interested and qualified candidates should send their CV and a brief cover letter highlighting their sales/marketing experience and any direct knowledge or experience with Canadian immigration applications to: [email protected] using the Job Position as the subject of the mail.

 

 

2.) Sales Representative

Job Location: Idumota / Lagos Island, Lagos
Employment Type: Full-time

Responsibilities
Sales and Customer Service:


	Assist walk-in customers by understanding their needs and providing appropriate product recommendations.
	Sell toys to both wholesale and retail customers, meeting individual and store sales targets.
	Build strong relationships with repeat customers to ensure customer loyalty and satisfaction.
	Make sales, attend and engage our online customers via our whats-app community.


Product Knowledge:


	Develop and maintain a deep understanding of the toy products, including their features and benefits, to effectively promote them to customers.
	Educate customers about product offerings and assist them in making informed purchase decisions. Store Maintenance:
	Ensure that the store is clean, organized, and well-stocked at all times.
	Assist in product display arrangements to promote sales and make the store more visually appealing.


Sales Reporting and Inventory Monitoring:


	Record all sales transactions accurately in the system and track inventory levels.
	Provide feedback to management regarding low stock levels and assist with stock replenishment when needed. Order Processing:
	Assist customers with placing orders for both wholesale and retail purchases.
	Coordinate with the logistics team to ensure the timely delivery and receipt of goods.


Customer Complaint Resolution:


	Handle any customer complaints or issues professionally and efficiently, ensuring customer satisfaction.
	Follow up with customers to ensure they are happy with their purchases and service. Additional Responsibilities:
	Perform other duties as required by the store manager to ensure smooth store operations and meet business needs.


Requirements
Education and Experience:


	Minimum of SSCE qualification.
	Experience in retail or sales, especially in a store setting, is preferred.
	Must reside within Idumota, Lagos Island, and environs


Skills and Competencies:


	Strong interpersonal and communication skills, with the ability to engage and build rapport with customers.
	Goal-oriented with a focus on achieving individual and store sales targets.
	Good organizational and multitasking skills.
	Ability to handle cash transactions and process payments accurately.
	Positive attitude, reliability, and a strong work ethic.


Benefits


	Salary: N70,000 - N100,000 monthly.
	transport
	One off day
	Weekly feeding
	KPI commission.


Application Closing Date: 31st March, 2026.

Method of Application
Interested and qualified candidates should send their CV to: [email protected] using the Job Position as the subject of the mail.

 

3.) Inventory Manager

Job Location: Idumota / Lagos Island, Lagos
Employment Type: Full-time

Job Overview


	Wholesale Toys is seeking a reliable and detail-oriented Inventory Officer to handle daily inventory operations.
	The ideal candidate will manage stock levels, organizing storage areas, pack supply orders, and support cleanliness and logistics within the store.
	This role works closely with other team members and requires physical activity and strong attention to detail.


Key Responsibilities
Inventory Management:


	Conduct daily physical stock checks in the stores.
	Update inventory records and alert the Account Officer/CEO on low or out of stock items.
	Assist in preparing and executing stock transfer orders accurately. Stock Handling & Movement
	Work with team members to move goods between store sections and to the office.
	Ensure all stock transfers are properly counted and logged.
	Support packing of supply orders, ensuring accurate labeling and tagging in line with invoice details.


Cleanliness & Sanitation:


	Assist with daily cleaning of the store and participate in scheduled sanitation routines.
	Ensure waste is disposed of daily and not carried over. o Help maintain a clean, safe, and organized storage environment


Support Duties:


	Notify the Account Officer when price tags are needed and help ensure correct pricing on all products.
	Ensure all goods in the store match invoice records and help maintain orderliness.
	Assist with basic logistics such as charging and turning off appliances and securing keys/devices at closing.
	These roles can expand according to business needs


Education and Experience


	Minimum of SSCE / OND / HND / BSc qualification
	1–3 years of experience in inventory, storekeeping, warehouse, or retail operations.
	Experience using inventory records, stock cards, or basic inventory software is an advantage.
	Must reside within Idumota, Lagos Island, or nearby environs.


Skills and Competencies:


	Good numerical and record-keeping skills with attention to detail.
	Ability to track stock movement and maintain accurate inventory records.
	Basic computer skills (Excel or inventory systems).
	Strong organizational and time-management skills.
	Ability to work independently and as part of a team.
	Honest, reliable, and accountable with strong integrity.
	Ability to lift or move stock items when required.


Benefits


	Salary: ?100,000 – ?150,000 monthly
	One off day weekly.
	Staff feeding.


Application Closing Date: 30th March, 2026.

Method of Application
Interested and qualified candidates should send their CV to: [email protected] using the Job Position as the subject of the mail.

     

    

        Click here to Apply
